title: Infosys Unveils AI-Enabled Australian Open 2026 Fan and Accessibility Experiences
detailed_summary: Infosys announced new AI-enabled experiences for Australian Open 2026 under its ongoing partnership with Tennis Australia. The release highlights Infosys Topaz-powered fan engagement and accessibility features, including MatchFeel, Rally, and Keys to the Match. No financial value, contract terms, revenue impact, or material operational update was disclosed.

key_facts.fact: Infosys unveiled its latest innovations for Australian Open 2026, powered by Infosys Topaz™.
key_facts.section_heading: Infosys and Tennis Australia Bring AI-First Experiences and Accessibility to Australian Open 2026

key_facts.fact: The announcement builds on an eight-year partnership between Infosys and Tennis Australia.
key_facts.section_heading: Infosys and Tennis Australia Bring AI-First Experiences and Accessibility to Australian Open 2026

key_facts.fact: MatchFeel will run as a pilot innovation for a select user group at AO 2026.

products_or_platforms.section_heading: Infosys and Tennis Australia Bring AI-First Experiences and Accessibility to Australian Open 2026

important_text_spans.text: Infosys (NSE, BSE, NYSE: INFY), a global leader in nextgeneration digital services and consulting, today unveiled its latest innovations for Australian Open (AO) 2026, powered by its generative and agentic AI suite, Infosys Topaz™.
important_text_spans.section_heading: Infosys and Tennis Australia Bring AI-First Experiences and Accessibility to Australian Open 2026
important_text_spans.reason: Supports the main announcement and identifies Infosys Topaz as the enabling AI suite.

important_text_spans.text: Building on an eight-year partnership with Tennis Australia, these advancements aim to redefine fan engagement, empower players and coaches, and push the boundaries of digital accessibility in tennis.
important_text_spans.section_heading: Infosys and Tennis Australia Bring AI-First Experiences and Accessibility to Australian Open 2026
important_text_spans.reason: Supports the partnership context and stated purpose of the innovations.
